heading: Leasing of commercial vehicles and equipment
label: 3681 Leasing of commercial vehicles and equipment
text: The Secretary of Defense may use leasing in the acquisition of commercial vehicles and equipment whenever the Secretary determines that such leasing is practicable and efficient.
